Author: OOFGames
Name: Gamba Where
Punchline: Find and host FFXIV gambling events near you.
Description: Browse active gambling events across Eorzea or host your own session. Use /gambawhere to open the interface.
Changelog:
Sorry guys, I know I am pumping these updates all at once, been working hard the past few days on these as separate features :P
- Added shareable preset, you can now share your rules and description and also import others! Thanks Tugan for the suggestion.
- Added a top prize rule for scratchcards to pick an in game item to share as a prize.
- Amended preview section to a dropdown to keep the tab clean.
